zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Batchiler於1589年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾惠維爾時，他的父親Stephen Bachiler28歲，母親Ann25歲。他於大約1620年與Hester Mercier在英國哈普爾素坦普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1645年4月9日在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Batchiler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Batchelor
meanings: English: status name for a young knight or novice at arms, Middle English and Old French bacheler (medieval Latin baccalarius). The word had already been extended to mean ‘(young) unmarried man’ by the 14th century, but it is unlikely that many bearers of the surname derive from the word in that sense.

History: The Reverend Stephen Bachiler (c. 1561–1656) was a Puritan nonconformist, born in Hampshire, England, who came to New England in 1632, at the age of 71. In 1638/9 he was the leader of the founders of Hampton, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Batchiler was born in 1589, in Wherwell, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen Bachiler, was 28 and his mother, Ann, was 25. He married Hester Mercier about 1620, in Southampton, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 April 1645, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

Il a épousé Hester Mercier environ 1620, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1645, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Batchiler(이)가 1589년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 화웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Bachiler(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1620년 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 Hester Mercier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1645년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Batchiler родился в 1589 г. в местности уирвелл, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen Bachiler было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hester Mercier около 1620 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 апреля 1645 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
